narrative:
Clearcreek Twp D (precinct in Warren County) has 1,339 registered voters, with 49.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 40.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.4 percentage points.
